title: Response
description: The Response interface of the Fetch API (since 0.5.1). Returned by ngx.fetch() as a resolved Promise.

ok.description: True if the response status is 200-299.

redirected.description: True if the response is the result of a redirect.

status.description: HTTP status code of the response.

statusText.description: Status message corresponding to the status code.

allOf.description: The Headers interface of the Fetch API (since 0.5.1). Represents HTTP headers and provides methods to manipulate them.

bodyUsed.description: True if the body has already been read.
